proofClaims: Defines a single-run prompt submission lock so one command cannot submit multiple prompts.
Defines generation lease evidence so artifact watchers must wait while generation is active instead of refreshing/resubmitting.
Defines download completion evidence so success cannot be marked until expected ZIP exists and has a completed file hash.
Defines stale handoff protection so old CLOSED_CLEANLY packets cannot complete a fresh retry command.
Defines duplicate generation as a BLOCKED_PACKET condition rather than silent failure.
Defines merge approval source evidence so automatic safe-merge is auditable and no silent merge is treated as owner approval.
